title: Houdini
lyrics:
[Intro]
Okay
Mm, ah

[Chorus]
I come and I go
  > [#1, 29 votes] This song and its particular lyrics refer to the art of “ghosting”. Which is an act of leaving your partner without saying or doing anything.
Tell me all the ways you need me
I'm not here for long
Catch me or I go Houdini
Catch me or I go Houdini
  > [#2, 80 votes] Harry Houdini, born Erik Weisz (March 24, 1874 – October 31, 1926), was a Hungarian-American illusionist and stunt performer notorious for getting out of time-sensitive situations in handcuffs or...
I come and I go
Prove you got the right to please me
Everybody knows

[Verse 1]
Time is passin' like a solar eclipse
  > [#3, 31 votes] Dua Lipa uses this as a simile to suggest that time is fleeting or passing quickly, much like the relatively short-lived event of a solar eclipse, implying that it seems to move swiftly and that...
See you watchin' and you blow me a kiss
It's your moment, baby, don't let it slip
Come in closer, are you readin' my lips?

[Chorus]
They say I come and I go
  > [#1, see above]
Tell me all the ways you need me
I'm not here for long
Catch me or I go Houdini
Catch me or I go Houdini
  > [#2, see above]
I come and I go
Prove you got the right to please me
Everybody knows

[Post-Chorus]
If you're good enough, you'll find the way
  > [#4, 27 votes] Although Dua warns her potential suitor that she could leave him for the next one in a heartbeat, the singer confesses in the post-chorus that she’s willing to change her roving ways and stick...
Maybe you could cause a girl to change (Her ways)
Do you think about it night and day?
Maybe you could be the one to make me stay

[Verse 2]
Everything you say is soundin' so sweet (Ah-ah)
But do you practise everything that you preach? (Ah-ah)
  > [#5, 13 votes] This line is an obvious reference to the line “Some people do, but some, they just like to talk” in Want To and to “You don’t have to be so cautious if you practice what you preach” in High. In all...
I need something that'll make me believe (Ah-ah)
If you got it, baby, give it to me

[Chorus]
They say I come and I go
  > [#1, see above]
Tell me all the ways you need me
I'm not here for long
Catch me or I go Houdini
Catch me or I go Houdini
  > [#2, see above]
I come and I go (I come and I go)
Prove you got the right to please me
Everybody knows (I'm not here for long)

[Post-Chorus]
If you're good enough, you'll find the way
  > [#4, see above]
Maybe you could cause a girl to change (Her ways)
Do you think about it night and day?
Maybe you could be the one to make me stay

[Bridge]
Oh-oh
Ooh

[Chorus]
I come and I go
  > [#1, see above]
Tell me all the ways you need me (Ooh)
I'm not here for long
Catch me or I go Houdini
Catch me or I go Houdini
  > [#2, see above]
I come and I go (I come and I go)
Prove you got the right to please me
Everybody knows (I'm not here for long)

[Outro]
Houdini (Ah)
  > [#2, see above]
Catch me or I go Houdini
